name: Very Rich, Very Thin Chocolate Lace Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Woman's Industrial Union in Boston
Melt the butter and chocolate in the top of a double boiler. Combine with egg and rest of ingredients. Drop by scant teaspoonfuls on greased cookie sheets. The finished cookies will be 3 to 4 inches in diameter so space them accordingly. Bake in preheated oven at 325°F for about 12 minutes. Watch carefully to prevent burning. When nearly cool, remove from the cookie sheet using a spatula. Press under the cookie with pressure against the sheet and they remove easily without crumbling. Place on racks to cool completely.
